ref: Jesus then said, “So it is. Everyone who is now last will be first, and everyone who is first will be last.” Jesus Again Tells about His Death (Mark
text: Keŋte Yesu yako wɔ nyiaa, “Mena mɔ te wɔle nyibaŋ baa kaa bese gyaŋgba nyibaŋ, na gyaŋgba nyibaŋ mɔ kaa bese wɔle nyibaŋ.” Yesu ka bese kolosi lee ɔ yeŋ wose man Maake
translated: Jesus said to them, "The kingdom of heaven is like a mustard seed that a man took and sowed in his field, and it is the smallest of all the seeds, but when it has grown it is the greatest of the garden herbs." Jesus left that place and went to the region of Magadan.

ref: But you prove you really are the relatives of the ones who killed the prophets.
text: Mena dɔɔ ɛ nɔɔwoya kɛŋa nawola la nyi, ɛ te sɛɛ nyi balaŋ baŋ bɔɔ koe Wurubuarɛ akpeŋkpeŋgyɔɔra baŋ nɛ, ɛ yɛɛ be duuluŋ man balaŋwɔ.
translated: The child is crying because she wants to go to her mother, but her mother is at the Wurubuarɛ festival grounds, so she is crying loudly.

ref: At once the disciples looked around, but they saw only Jesus.
text: Debokenaŋ man ɔ kaseela batooro baŋ besewɔ kɛɛ na, ba te naa walaŋ kamasɛ kpu na Yesu ya.
translated: The book says that there were some stubborn people who did not want to listen, but they were forced to hear about Jesus.

ref: All of these come from your heart, and they are what make you unfit to worship God. A Woman's Faith (Matthew
text: Nombiakumɛɛ kɛŋa pou na lee bo walaŋ konɔɔ man, te ŋan ne yɛɛ na e ayimɛɛ.” Siria alo ŋolo ke lɛɛ Yesu di Mateo
translated: The kingdom of heaven is like a treasure hidden in a field. When a man found it, he hid it again, and then in his joy he went and sold all he had and bought that field. - Jesus said in Matthew

ref: On that day they will be told they are either innocent or guilty because of the things they have said. A Sign from Heaven (Mark
text: Nawolo nyi walaŋ kamasɛ nɔɔwoya te baa mo di ɔ nombia, na baa naa nyi ɔ dii deŋele, yaa ɔ dii fɔɔ.” Bɛɛ gyae nyi Yesu waa yɛɛ gyakoloŋ nombia Maake
translated: They said, "We have never seen anything like this before! What new teaching is this? With authority and power he commands even unclean spirits and they obey him." The news about Jesus spread quickly throughout the whole region of Galilee and also to surrounding regions.
